recommendations.title: The Invisible Witness
recommendations.overview: Adriano wakes up in a hotel room next to the dead body of his lover, Laura. The door is locked from the inside and there is no evidence of anybody else in the room.

recommendations.title: No Date, No Signature
recommendations.overview: Kaveh Nariman is a Doctor in the medical examiner's office. One day at his work he meets a corpse which is very familiar to him.

recommendations.title: Made in U.S.A
recommendations.overview: Paula Nelson goes to Atlantic City to meet her lover, Richard Politzer, but finds him  dead and decides to investigate his death. In her hotel room, she meets Typhus, whom she ends up knocking out. His corpse is later found in the apartment of David

recommendations.title: Sanctuary
recommendations.overview: Confined to a claustrophobic hotel room, the heir to a hotel empire and the dominatrix who has primed him for success become locked in a battle of wits and wills as he tries to end his relationship with her.

recommendations.title: Unknown
recommendations.overview: Five men wake up in a locked-down warehouse with no memory of who they are. They are forced to figure out who is good and who is bad to stay alive.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Door Lock
recommendations.overview: Kyung-min lives alone in a one-room apartment. One day, she finds traces of a stranger breaking into her room and soon a mysterious murder case begins to unravel.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: Guilty as Sin
recommendations.overview: Before a criminal lawyer knows what has happened, she is forced to defend a wife killer she knows is guilty.

recommendations.title: Only Mine
recommendations.overview: Tormented and left for dead by a scorned lover, a woman finds the strength within herself to recover and retaliate against her abuser.
